title: RecipeCreateX
description: A plugin which allows you to create custom recipes with custom items from ItemMakerX or vanilla items
body:
🍳 RecipeCreateX Current version: 1.0 Best with: ItemMakerX ✨ Overview: RecipeCreateX gives you the power to create custom crafting recipes right in-game. Use an elegant GUI to make both shaped and shapeless recipes, control visibility, log creations, and even announce them to your server. Best of all, it works flawlessly with custom items made by ItemMakerX! 🧪 Features: Drag-and-drop GUI to create recipes instantly Support for shaped and shapeless crafting Optional: Recipe overwrite protection Recipe deletion backups Recipe creation announcements Custom item support via ItemMakerX Shapeless recipe cap limit control Similar-item recipe lookup for easy management Complete permission setup and full customization of messages 💡 Why Choose RecipeCreateX? No Coding Needed Build complex crafting recipes in seconds — no command memorization, no YAML writing, just intuitive GUI clicks. Create Your Own Economy Let players earn gear instead of giving it through commands. Set up rare crafting chains or balanced upgrades with custom items from ItemMakerX. Total Control Choose whether to allow overwriting recipes, auto-log every creation, or even backup every change. It’s built for server admins who care about quality and control. Integrates Like Magic Drop in ItemMakerX and your custom items instantly become recipe-ready. Seamless. No extra setup. Ideal for All Server Types Survival? Add a recipe for reinforced tools. RPG? Create crafting chains for legendary weapons. Minigames? Add fun custom recipes as rewards. 🔗 Already using ItemMakerX? Level up your server’s gameplay loop by letting players craft what you create! Not using it? Find it at [https://modrinth.com/organization/survivalcraft](https://modrinth.com/organization/survivalcraft)
Advertisement:
